questions.text: When you buy things online — whether it's gear, clothes, or random stuff — which platforms do you actually use? Are you an Amazon-everything person, prefer buying direct from brands, or do you hunt for deals on specific sites?

What's your fitness 'why' right now? Are you training for something specific (a race, a sport, strength goals), primarily doing it for mental health and routine, or just maintaining so you can keep doing the activities you love like volleyball?

Are you actively learning any languages right now, or working toward a specific fluency goal? And when you meet someone who doesn't speak English, how do you handle communication — Google Translate, try to piece it together, or just default to English and see what happens?

What's your financial philosophy when it comes to investing? Are you index-fund-and-forget-it, more hands-on with individual stocks/crypto, or a bit of both? Do you have specific FIRE-style goals or just want enough to keep your options open?

What's your relationship with social media and online presence these days? Are you someone who posts regularly, only lurks, or mostly off-platform? And do you think about how you come across online, or is that not something you stress about?
